desc: TransactionStore.records is class-level, so all store instances share and accumulate the same transactions.
fn_processTransactions creates separate totals for the same user when that user's transactions are not contiguous in the input.
fn_processTransactions returns [0] for an empty transaction list, falsely reporting a group with a zero total.
Analyzer.analyze raises an exception when data is empty or contains only zero values because mean, median, and max require nonempty input.
Analyzer.analyze silently treats every unrecognized mode as mean, masking invalid caller input and producing potentially incorrect results.
TransactionStore.get_all returns the internal records list directly, allowing callers to mutate store contents without using the store API.
calculate_stats raises IndexError on empty input when accessing temp[0] before it can return statistics.
format_transaction raises TypeError when a present date value is not a string, including when date is explicitly None.
